what_it_does: It enumerates the verified-by-use completion criteria, decision gates, dependency ordering, and definition-of-done for building one address-space + registry-of-registries + act-layer application, rendered through one instrument.
observations: Divided into 8 parts plus a DECISIONS-FOR-TIM section and a priority order.
Every criterion is tagged with a status emoji: ✅ verified, 🟡 designed, 🟠 built-unexercised, 🔴 gap/broken.
Each criterion is split into FUNCTION (behaviour) and FORM (operator-facing surface) where relevant.
Requires by-use verification, falsify-first tests, and rejects code-reading or docstring claims as green.
Mandates reconciling sibling build-prep streams (RCN1–RCN7) before dependent work.
Separates syntax, resolution, and identity into three independent groups.
Requires SCHEMES to be derived from a file-discovered scheme registry rather than a hardcoded tuple.
Makes GR5 (recursive grammar for nested vec://cluster:// addresses) a hard order gate before GR1 rows are writable.
Storage verdict is local Postgres + pgvector, with an ext4-only / no-/mnt/c data-directory guard.
Migration requires operator confirmation before the first real-data mutation and must be rollbackable.
The act-layer keystone loop must route through an operator-gated dispatch wire (C9.2), not launch builds directly.
FORM deliverables are handed off to sibling streams as enforced system-memory Gap rows that block overall-done.
DECISIONS-FOR-TIM is reduced to five genuine meaning/direction questions, framed after both-plus-others modelling.
Coverage must first converge onto an already-completed coverage sweep, then run open-ended.
Repeated floors: registry-is-truth, C9.4 three anchors, store constitution, fail-loud, Rule 7 confirm-before-mutation, operator-gated dispatch.
standouts: The explicit three-way cut: grammar (syntax) ≠ resolution ≠ identity, each failing independently.
GR5 recursive-grammar gate: vec://cluster://...#space=... must parse correctly before SCHEMES rows for vec/cluster can be written.
Operator-gated build wire (C9.2): triggers surface intent; operator resolve; dispatch_decision launches claude -p; no path may emit resolve/approve/dispatch by construction.
Local-first Postgres + pgvector with a fail-loud refusal to initialize on /mnt/c (WSL fsync corruption hazard).
FORM handoffs are enforced system-memory Gap rows, not prose pointers; overall-done is blocked until they close.
DECISIONS-FOR-TIM is a minimal set of five meaning questions, after lead models both-plus-others.
conventions: Uses ID-prefixed criterion labels (GR1, RES1, ID1, REG1, SEAM1, ACT1, LENS1, INST1, etc.).
Uses status emojis with explicit definitions and a distinct built-but-unexercised state.
References sibling files and streams by relative paths and task numbers.
Requires durable artifacts (channel synthesis or registry/decision row) for any claimed lead decision.
Uses FUNCTION/FORM split for every criterion where an operator surface exists.
Applies a set of invariant floors across all lines: registry-is-truth, C9.4 three anchors, store constitution, fail-loud, Rule 7, ext4-only, operator-gated dispatch.
Demands falsify-first tests for verified bugs and drift-guards.
Uses enforced Gap rows in system memory for cross-stream handoffs and deferred work.
concerns: Extremely dense with cross-references and conditional gates, making it hard to read in isolation.
Many criteria are conditional on open reconciles (RCN1–RCN7), so the document is inherently unstable until those complete.
Heavy meta-governance and verification ritual may slow execution.
Repeated assertions of fail-loud and enforced Gap rows, but no concrete schema for a Gap row is shown in the file.
The distinction between lead-decides and Tim-decides relies on human judgment and artifact discipline that is not machine-checkable from the file alone.
notes: A heavily gated, verification-first checklist that tries to make the one-application union provably done rather than asserted done.
questions: What is the exact schema and storage location of a system-memory Gap row?
How are the RCN reconciles recorded and verified as durable artifacts?
What is the concrete implementation of the operator-gated dispatch wire (C9.2)?
How is render-for-cognition evaluated in practice?
What tooling performs the live re-census of Shape-A units?
How does this file relate to the non-UNION COMPLETION-CRITERIA.md it replaces?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a truth-table completion criteria for the one-application union; actual content is a gated, verification-heavy checklist with decision taxonomy and dependency ordering, matching that purpose.
intention_signals: It is trying to stop the build from quietly papering over deep architectural clashes by forcing every claim to be exercised, every external stream reconciled, every meaning decision surfaced to the operator, and every UI deliverable tracked as a closed Gap.
novelty: The explicit syntax≠resolution≠identity three-way split and the recursive-grammar-before-flattening order gate; the built-but-unexercised status; the enforced Gap-row handoff mechanism for cross-stream FORM work; the minimal DECISIONS-FOR-TIM set.
contribution: A rigorous, auditable completion-criteria template that separates developer decisions from operator meaning decisions, mandates by-use verification, and tracks cross-stream deliverables as enforced registry gaps rather than prose pointers.
summary_for_embedding: A completion-criteria document enumerating verified-by-use conditions, decision gates, dependency ordering, and definition-of-done for unifying the company's substrate, registry, act-layer, and instrument surfaces into one addressable application.
intention_for_embedding: To give the build loop a truth-table against which to verify the one-application union without green-painting unresolved architecture, identity, storage, coverage, and form questions.
